layout_contract.quiet_zone: center 70% protected by black field or low-detail plate
layout_contract.motion_bounds: title and accent path stay inside textRect during entry, hold, and exit

support_assets.style_lock: Matches vector template palette, stroke width, contrast, and lighting direction.
support_assets.safe_zones: Must stay outside textRect and below top platform UI unless acting as the title reveal mask.
support_assets.motion_purpose: The accent path guides attention and becomes transition material.
support_assets.anchoring_contract: Connector must name visible start/end anchors or be replaced by a component-attached signal.
support_assets.entrance_exit_timing: Enters after title mask reveal; exits or hands off before scene transition.
support_assets.deletion_trigger: Delete if the path does not guide attention, bridge a transition, or strengthen the keyword.

visual_components.role: Concrete product surface or proof artifact.
visual_components.icon_or_mark: cursor / prompt dot / route node / none
visual_components.connector_anchor: visible start/end anchors, or none if using card-edge signal / node / status dot
visual_components.motion_interaction: type, highlight, route, fan, assemble, check, lock, publish, save, or export.
visual_components.safe_zones: Component stays inside declared layout contract and outside platform overlays.
visual_components.deletion_trigger: Delete only if another component proves the same claim more clearly.

primitive_chain.selection_reason: The hook should feel disclosed, not faded in.
The accent path guides attention to the amplified keyword.
